ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return achieved in the iteration */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after the training iteration */,
  "dLoss" REAL /* Change in loss after the training iteration */,
  "num_trajectories" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories in the iteration */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the training */,
  "average_discounted_return" REAL /* Average discounted return for the iteration */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return achieved in the iteration */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of the return in the iteration */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before the training iteration */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the model's predictions */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the model's predictions */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean Kullback-Leibler divergence */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance of the model's predictions */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return for the iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific run of the training */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the iteration */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the iteration */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used for training */,
  "regularization" TEXT /* Regularization techniques used */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware used for training */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken for the iteration */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* Validation metrics for the iteration */,
  "training_mode" TEXT /* Training mode (training or validation) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being trained */,
  "run_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training run started */,
  "run_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training run ended */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the training run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the training run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the training run was executed */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* JSON object of the model architecture */,
  "training_configuration" TEXT /* JSON object of the training configuration */,
  "resource_allocation" TEXT /* JSON object of resource allocation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project to which the training run belongs */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of user IDs of collaborators involved in the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project owner */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of user IDs of collaborators in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
